display_name_private.description: A vivid, person-like description — NOT an analytical label. Example: '45岁二胎妈妈，孩子上小学，抖音重度用户，看到什么都信' NOT '情绪化受影响读者'.

age_range.description: Age bracket. Examples: '12-15', '16-19', '20-25', '26-35', '36-45', '46-55', '56-65', '65+'. Use specific ranges, not vague labels.

education_level.description: Highest education or equivalent. Examples: '小学', '初中', '高中/中专', '大专', '本科', '硕士', '博士'. Determines cognitive sophistication of thinking and speech.

occupation.description: Current or most recent occupation. Be specific: '全职妈妈', '外卖骑手', '初三学生', '退休工人', '自媒体博主', '高校教师', '村委干部'. NOT just '专业人士'.

location_type.description: Geographic context affecting information access and cultural frame.

speech_style.description: How this person actually talks in real life. Examples: '口语化、大量语气词、经常跑题', '简短粗暴、爱用网络梗、不喜欢长篇大论', '条理清晰、习惯引用数据和专业术语', '方言口音重、比喻多、讲道理靠讲故事', '话少但一针见血、不喜欢废话'. This MUST be reflected in both think.private.json inner_monologue and say.public.json speech_text.

cultural_background.description: Cultural or subcultural identity that shapes worldview. Examples: '传统家庭观念重', '二次元文化圈', '田园女权社群', '军迷圈', '佛系青年', '鸡娃家长群'. Optional but recommended.

topic_relevance.description: How relevant this topic is to the character. INDIFFERENT characters may participate but show low engagement. OFF_TOPIC characters may derail the discussion or talk about unrelated things — this is realistic behavior.

brand_stance.description: Pre-existing attitude toward the content source or brand. Independent of behavioral dimensions — a hostile-opposition actor may still be honest, and a loyal-enthusiast may selectively frame facts.
